title: Smoothify
description: Experience lightning-fast gameplay with our optimized Fabric modpack, designed to enhance performance and reduce lag. Packed with quality-of-life improvements, it ensures a smoother, more efficient Minecraft experience without sacrificing the fun!
body:
# **Smoothify: Ultimate Performance Boost**

![Thumbnail](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e549c4b3a639748aa435d29950abd6f776130a9_0.webp)

## Overview
Experience lightning-fast gameplay with our optimized Fabric modpack, designed to enhance performance and reduce lag. Packed with quality-of-life improvements, it ensures a smoother, more efficient Minecraft experience without sacrificing the fun!

## Features
- **Performance Optimization**: Tweaked settings to maximize FPS and minimize stuttering, even with heavy mod use.
- **Quality of Life Enhancements**: Small but impactful tweaks for a better gaming experience.
- **Lag Reduction**: Enhanced memory management, better garbage collection, and system resource optimizations.
- **Optifine Textures/Models Support**: Enjoy full compatibility with Optifine textures and models.
- **Optifine Features**: Includes all Optifine features for enhanced graphics and smoother gameplay.
- **Shaders Support**: Add stunning shaders to your world for more immersive visuals.
- **Cape Integration**: Access your capes from your favorite providers with ease.

## Frequently Asked Questions

- **How do I update mods within the modpack?**  
  Updating mods using the Modrinth launcher is simple. Just click the "Update" button in the launcher, and it will automatically update all mods if any updates are available.

- **How can I address issues I encounter while using the modpack?**  
  If you encounter any bugs or issues, you can seek support from us on our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/B4QsfUrdUR).

## Notes
This modpack is built to run smoothly on most modern systems. However, you can adjust the memory settings based on your system’s available RAM. 

## Support
Get the fastest support from our team regarding this modpack and our other services on our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/B4QsfUrdUR).

Enjoy a faster, smoother Minecraft experience!
